case_title: CITY & COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO VS ASHFORD, LEONARD A.

docket_entries.description: MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $3,773.90 FILED BY CITY & COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO OFFICE OF THE TREASURER & TAX COLLECTOR AS TO DEFENDANT ASHFORD, LEONARD A. ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR MAY-09-2003 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT 506
SMALL CLAIMS DISPOSITION MAY-09-2003, CONTINUED BY COURT TO JUL-11-2003 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT 506 PER PLTF'S REQUEST.
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF SERVED AS TO DEFENDANT ASHFORD, LEONARD A.

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF CITY & COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO OFFICE OF THE TREASURER & TAX COLLECTOR RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT ASHFORD, LEONARD A. $3,773.90 PRINCIPAL, $35.50 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $3,809.40 STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS
SMALL CLAIMS DISPOSITION JUL-11-2003, CONTINUED BY COURT TO OCT-09-2003 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT 506

SMALL CLAIMS DISPOSITION OCT-09-2003, CONTINUED BY COURT TO DEC-10-2003 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT 506 PLAINTIFF REQUEST FOR 3RD CONTINUANCE GRANTED. PLAINTIFF TOLD COSTLY FOR CCSF & COURT TO KEEP CONTINUANCES. PLAINTIFF WANTED 30 DAYS; GAVE 60 SO IT HOPEFULLY WILL BE RESOLVED.
